original_statement: what is the most points won by in overtime?
mutated_statement: what is the most something got by in some period?
mutation_analysis: Genericization + Verb substitution + Temporal generalization: "points" → "something" (specific metric → vague placeholder) | "won by" → "got by" (lexical simplification) | "overtime" → "some period" (specific time → vague period) (what is the most points won by in overtime? → what is the most something got by in some period?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought中的句子“The phrase ‘most got by’ is interpreted as the largest margin of victory...”以及iteration中simple_query的thought“To determine the most a team won by...The largest margin is 23 points...”可以识别出Agent注意到问题用词被泛化/替换并明确说明了其采用的解释方式。Agent随后按照该假设计算每场比赛的胜分差并给出具体答案（23分并指出对应比赛日期），但没有向用户请求澄清或列出其它可能解释。因而其行为既承认了目标表述的模糊性，又直接基于一个假设进行推断并给出确定性答案，符合“意识到目标模糊，猜测目标”类别的判定标准。
